The '''Kalranoos carbine''' was a sonic carbine weapon developed by weapons engineer [[Bobor Kalranoos]]<ref name="SWG:KC" /> during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|196|Kalranoos carbine}}</ref> It was a hybrid design that stemmed from the modifications of a [[Geonosian sonic blaster/Legends|Geonosian carbine]].<ref name="SWG:KC" /> It was equipped with a bio-link module that permitted its user to be directly interfaced with the weapon.<ref name="TCSWE" />

One particular Kalranoos carbine was found in [[Sordaan Xris]]'s collection of exotic weapons. Sordaan claimed to have acquired the weapon in a wager with a [[Leresai]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="SWG:KC" /> Another such weapon was found by a spacer on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:RCWMII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Carbine Weapons Mark II}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Kalranoos carbine appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:KC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Kalranoos carbine was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']] on [[May 5]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:KC" />
